languages.text:
The next time an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gains any number of stacks of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}cooperative advantage{/g}, another ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} also gains +1 stack of this effect.
Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.

The next time an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gains any number of stacks of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}cooperative advantage{/g}, another ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} also gains +1 stack of this effect.
Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer +1 stack of disturbed for 1 round. Stacks.
At the end of the turn, the user suffers a {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}.

The next time an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gains any number of stacks of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}cooperative advantage{/g}, another ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} also gains +1 stack of this effect.
Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}.

The next time an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gains any number of stacks of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}cooperative advantage{/g}, another ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} also gains +1 stack of this effect.
Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}.

languages.text:
В следующий раз, когда союзник с эффектом {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}работа в команде{/g} получает уровни {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}командного преимущества{/g}, другой союзник с эффектом {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}работа в команде{/g} также получает +1 уровень {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}командного преимущества{/g}.
Каждый раз, когда обладатель аугмента использует эту способность, он получает +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}тревожности{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Эффект суммируется.

Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer 1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.

В следующий раз, когда союзник с эффектом {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}работа в команде{/g} получает уровни {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}командного преимущества{/g}, другой союзник с эффектом {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}работа в команде{/g} также получает +1 уровень {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}командного преимущества{/g}.

languages.text:
La prochaine fois qu'un allié affecté par {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}Travail en équipe{/g} gagne des cumuls d'{g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}Avantage du travail en équipe{/g}, un autre allié affecté par {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}Travail en équipe{/g} reçoit également +1 cumul de cet effet.
Lorsque l'utilisateur se sert de cette capacité, il subit +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}Perturbation{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cumulable.

languages.text:
{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}Takım çalışması{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birim, bir daha herhangi bir sayıda {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}takım çalışması avantajı{/g} birikimi kazandığında {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}takım çalışması{/g} etkisindeki başka bir dost birim de bu etkinin 1 birikimini elde eder.
Kullanıcı, bu kabiliyeti kullandığında 1 {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}kaygı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etki 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

languages.text:
受{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}团队合作{/g}影响的盟友下次获得任意层数的{g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}团队优势{/g}时，另一名受{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}团队合作{/g}影响的盟友也获得1层此效果。
使用者每次使用此能力，受到1层{g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}惊扰{/g}效果，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}，此效果可叠加。

Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer 1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.

受{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}团队合作{/g}影响的盟友下次获得任意层数的{g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}团队优势{/g}时，另一名受{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}团队合作{/g}影响的盟友也获得1层此效果。

languages.text:
La próxima vez que un aliado afectado por {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}labor conjunta{/g} reciba cualquier número de acumulaciones de {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}ventaja de labor conjunta{/g}, otro aliado afectado por {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}labor conjunta{/g} recibe también +1 acumulación de este efecto.
Cada vez que el usuario utiliza esta capacidad, recibe 1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}perturbado{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Este efecto es acumulativo.

Cada vez que el usuario utiliza esta capacidad, recibe 1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}perturbado{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Este efecto es acumulativo.

languages.text:
Der nächste Verbündete, der mit {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}Teamwork{/g} belegt wird, erhält beliebige Stapel von {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}Teamwork-Vorteil{/g}, ein anderer mit {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}Teamwork{/g} belegter Verbündeter erhält ebenfalls +1 Stapel dieses Effektes.
Setzt der Nutzer diese Fähigkeit ein, wird er 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang mit 1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}Verstört{/g} belegt. Stapelbar.

languages.text:
{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}チームワーク{/g}の影響を受けている味方が次に{g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}協力的優位{/g}を何スタックか得たとき、{g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}チームワーク{/g}の影響を受けている別の味方もこの効果を1スタック得る。
使用者がこのアビリティを使用するたびに、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間{g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}動揺{/g}を1スタック受ける。スタックする。

使用者がこのアビリティを使用するたびに、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間{g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}動揺{/g}を1スタック受ける。スタックする。
